S
SecureApp
Login Forgot Password Confirmation Reset Password Reset Success

Forgot your password?

Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send instructions to reset your password. For security, we won't reveal whether an account exists.

Request received

If an account exists for the email you provided, we’ve sent instructions to reset your password. Check your inbox and follow the link. The message may take a few minutes to arrive.

Return to sign in

We'll send a password reset link if an account exists.
Need help?
Contact support
We’ll never share your email.
html_files.wireframe-SCR-003-forgot-password-confir:
Acme
Sign in

Check your email

If an account exists for the address you provided, we’ve sent an email with instructions to reset your password. For your privacy we won’t reveal whether the address is associated with an account.

Next steps
Look for an email from no-reply@acme.example. If you don't see it, check your spam or promotions folder. The link will expire in 24 hours.
Back to sign in Contact support
Prefer a different option? You can enter a recovery code or try again.

html_files.wireframe-SCR-004-reset-password.html:
PW

Reset your password

Securely set a new password for your account. This link is token-protected and time-limited.

Login (SCR-001) Forgot Password (SCR-002) Forgot Confirmation (SCR-003) Reset Password (SCR-004) Reset Success (SCR-005)
Tips:
  • Use a unique, long passphrase.
  • Combination of letters, numbers, special characters.
  • Do not reuse passwords from other accounts.
Token demo: pass ?token=valid or ?token=expired
Support: support@example.com

Set a new password

Enter a new secure password. You will be signed in after a successful reset.

!
This reset link has expired or is invalid
Request a new password reset link to continue. The token used here may have been already redeemed.
Request new link or Return to sign in
✓
Password reset complete
Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new credentials.
Go to sign in Success screen
Must meet all rules below.
Re-enter the same password to confirm.

Uppercase letter

Number

Tip: use a phrase or sentence to increase length and memorability.
html_files.wireframe-SCR-005-reset-password-success:
PW

Acme Account
Login (SCR-001) Forgot Password (SCR-002) Confirmation (SCR-003) Reset Password (SCR-004)
Password Updated

Your password has been reset

Great — your password was updated successfully. For your security, this reset token has been invalidated and any temporary failed attempt counters have been cleared.

What this means
Your reset session is complete. Any token that could have been used to change your password is no longer valid, and any temporary failed-attempt counters related to this process have been cleared.
Go to Login Request another reset
View confirmation steps Reset with token (SCR-004) Contact support
